scripts.typecheck: pnpm typecheck:candidate && pnpm typecheck:recruiter && pnpm typecheck:admin
scripts.test: pnpm test:candidate && pnpm test:recruiter && pnpm test:admin
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm test:coverage:candidate && pnpm test:coverage:recruiter && pnpm test:coverage:admin
scripts.ci:candidate: pnpm lint:candidate && pnpm typecheck:candidate && pnpm test:coverage:candidate && pnpm build:candidate
scripts.ci:recruiter: pnpm lint:recruiter && pnpm typecheck:recruiter && pnpm test:coverage:recruiter && pnpm build:recruiter
scripts.ci:admin: pnpm lint:admin && pnpm typecheck:admin && pnpm test:coverage:admin && pnpm build:admin
scripts.ci:apps: pnpm ci:candidate && pnpm ci:recruiter && pnpm ci:admin
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.ci: pnpm install:all && pnpm generate:api && pnpm verify
